content:
Hi everyone! I’m seeking a new role and would appreciate your support. If you hear of any opportunities or just want to catch up, please send me a message or comment below. Call me 7004669327. I’d love to reconnect. 
hashtag
#OpenToWork

About me & what I’m looking for:
💼 I’m looking for Lawyer, Corporate Lawyer, Assistant Lawyer, Junior Lawyer, and Advocate roles.
🌎 I’m open to roles in any city of India.
